case_title: DUNN, FRED J. VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-14-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-22-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 ORDER GRANTED.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,250.00 FILED BY DUNN, FRED J. AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO PADILLA, NANCY (#0793) C/O SF MUNICIPAL RAILWAY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-22-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-22-2003, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO NOV-14-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CLAIMANT HAS FOUR(4) CLAIMS WHICH SHOULD BE CONSOLIDATED.
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF AS TO DEFENDANT PADILLA, NANCY (#0793) C/O SF MUNICIPAL RAILWAY
PLTFF'S REQUEST FOR AN ORDER TO "ADVANCE" HEARING DATE TO 10/22/03(WED)AT 1:30PM (CAL:20-10);IFP; TO FOLDER FOR THE COMM'S DETERMINATION.
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING TO NANCY PADILLA RETURNED; REFUSED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DUNN, FRED J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $500.00, DEFENDANT PADILLA DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AT REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO - NO APPEARANCE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
